title: VSetModelWin Method, Spel Class
syntax: Sub VSetModelWin (Sequence As String, Object As String, Left As Integer, Top As Integer, Width As Integer, Height As Integer)
parameters:
Sequence	String expression
		 containing the name of a vision sequence in the current EPSON
		 RC+ project.

Object	String expression
		 containing the name of an object in sequence Sequence.

Left	Integer expression
		 representing left coordinate in pixels.

Top	Integer expression
		 representing top coordinate in pixels.

Width	Integer expression
		 representing width in pixels.

Height	Integer expression
		 representing height in pixels.
see_also:
VGetModelWin

VGetSearchWin

VSetSearchWin

VSetModelWin Example

VB
examples:
Dim left As Integer, top As Integer
Dim width As Integer, height As Integer

With m_spel
    .VGetModelWin("testSeq", "corr01", left, top, _ width, height)
    .VSetModelWin("testSeq", "corr01", left + 20, top, _ width, height)
    .VTeach("testSeq", "corr01")
End With
